sourceTitle: Mad Benji FOH checklists (arrival / changeover / cleaning / setup)

checklists.title: First Person Arrival — Opening
items: Shop needs to be ready by 7am. NO LATER.
OPENING PRIORITY — Rule: do not move to the next area until the previous area is fully set up.
Order: Outside area (first) → Floor area (second) → Bar (last).
OUTSIDE
1. Take bakery to the back — carry sourdough (the heaviest) by itself and make sure it's on the bottom.
2. Take outside benches, tables and boards to the front.
3. Check outside floor and clean if needed.
4. Put umbrellas up (not if it's windy).
5. Fill up dog water. Location: outdoor next to window 1.
FLOOR
1. Turn on lights; check the floor and bench seating for crumbs before putting chairs down, sweep if required.
2. Table setup: tables need to be in line properly (weekends & public holidays: split window tables).
3. Put flowers on table — wall/window side table: against wall/window. Free-standing table: center.
4. Turn on display cabinet light.
5. Turn on heating or cooling (depends on temperature), also behind-bar aircon. DO TOGETHER!
6. Turn music on: make sure all speakers are connected and grouped. Volume: 37 for all.
Check time — if 6:45am and kitchen person is not here: call kitchen person first, call Ryan second, if neither answers call Mei.
BAR PART 1 — check all electronics FIRST!
1. Make sure tablets for Uber, DoorDash and Otto are on, logged in and connected to wifi.
2. If they are not connected, wifi is on labrahamPOS@Mad_Benji.
3. Check the Square is working (reactivate if it's not).
4. Get till from fridge and put into cash register.
5. Take out banana bread; ask chef to cut more if needed.
6. 3 containers for dirty dishes (bun tub, white ice cream tub, grey long tub).
7. Fill up 4 waters (thermometers, ice cream scoops, cutlery boxes).
8. Get 2 green tea towels (1 on top of coffee machine and 1 on knock tube) and 3 blue cloths (coffee machine, freezer and bench).
9. Turn on 4 machines: milk frother, tamp (password 1234), normal grinder, decaf grinder.
10. Make sure thermometer jug has 2 thermometers and 2 spoons (1 teaspoon and 1 tablespoon).
BAR PART 2 — Coffee machine
Rule: get your station ready! Ensure everything is topped up before the rush (2 tubs coffee bean, 4 cup trays, 2 cup trays, all powders, sugar, equal, syrups, take away cups & lids).
1. Bring out milk into speed rack.
2. Get 4 coffee shot pots.
3. Take out your preferred jugs for milk.
4. Put regular & large lids next to frother if that makes you more efficient.
5. Pour 2 shots on each group head, weigh and check time.
6. Check times and keep an eye on them.
7. Purge steam wands for around 10 seconds.
8. Check bookings.
9. Unlock front door.
10. Turn on all lights.

checklists.title: Second Person Arrival
items: Checks
Check overhead menus are pushed in.
Check display cabinet light.
Check all heaters and cooling systems are turned on (both floor area and bar area).
Check all speakers are connected and grouped. Volume: 37 for all.
Check all tablets (Uber, Otter, DoorDash) are active & charging.
Fill up water bottles.
Place salt & pepper grinders on tables — wall/window tables: against wall/window. Free-standing tables: center.
Check bookings.
Ask chefs the muffin flavour and put the sign up.
Polish cutlery.

checklists.title: Floor Station Set-up
items: Rule: get your station ready for the day!
Floor
Refill water bottles.
Refill all spray bottles.
Top up dinner napkins.
Polish cutlery.
Top up cookies.
Top up banana bread.
Top up loyalty card (counter & long bench).
Top up take away menu (counter & long bench).
Top up sugar jar.
Top up salt & pepper grinder.

checklists.title: 3PM Changeover
items: FLOOR — make sure floor is cleaned
Sweep floor and dry wipe bench seating if crumbly.
Collect salt, pepper and sugar and put back neatly.
Put napkin dispensers on tables.
Move overhead menu boards out.
Polish cutlery.
Top up half of water bottles.
Check floor is set up properly before leaving.
Check & clear all unpaid transactions from morning.
Clear your staff meal before leaving.
BAR — make sure bench is wiped out & tidy
Wash dishes: make sure sink is mostly empty.
Empty the juicer and wash the filter.
Empty milk crate for milk bottles.
Empty rubbish bin.
Clean milkshake machine.
Polish cutlery.
Change over ice cream scoop water.
Check & clear all unpaid transactions from morning.
Clear your staff meal before leaving.
BARISTA — make sure coffee station is cleaned and tidy
Top up: full cream & skinny milk.
Top up: coffee bean.
Top up: chai powder & leaves.
Top up: raw sugar & equals.
Top up: take away cups & lids.
Change over thermometer jug water.
Rinse out jug rinser with hot water.
Rinse out portafilter baskets with hot water.
Empty knock tube.
Check & clear all unpaid transactions from morning.
Clear your staff meal before leaving.

checklists.title: FOH Weekly Cleaning & Other Tasks
items: Barista
Refill tea bags (at least 5 of each, English breakfast x10).
Refill take away babychino spoons.
Wash chai leaves tub.
Wash chocolate powder tub.
Wash chai powder tub.
Wash sugar jar.
Wash all shakers.
Wash marshmallow jar.
Clean coffee syrup pumps.
Clean top of coffee machine (under mugs).
Make cold drip.
Soak steam wands with coffee cleaner (make sure to rinse and purge well after).
Bar
Refill pastry bags and retail bags.
Refill milkshake syrups.
Clean milkshake syrup pumps.
Sanitise iPad / service area.
Clean chest freezer doors (inside and outside).
Sanitise pastries frame.
Clean the bin's wall.
Prepare retail bag (250g and 1000g).

checklists.title: FOH Monthly Deep Cleaning
items: Defrost and clean chest freezer.
Move chest freezer out and sweep and mop underneath.
Remove and clean x3 windows of overhead milkshake milk/cookies fridges.
Clean inside of overhead milkshake milk/cookies fridges.
Clean wall behind milkshake toppings.
Clean wall sink area.
Scrub wall and bottom of the shelves around the juicer.
Rinse out entire coffee knock tube.
Clean coffee station shelves.
Clean space under coffee machine.
Clean cup tray and juicer glass shelves (next to the till).
Clean inside of coffee milk and canned drinks fridges.
Clean inside of fruit fridge.
Clean black storage shelves.
Bleach and mop bathroom floor.
Apply duck liquid to toilet bowl and scrub.
Wipe shelves of Frank Green bottles (near coffee machine and in display cabinet).
Clean display cabinet windows.
Wipe bench and tiles of Middle 1-3 walls.
Clean inside all bench storage.
Clean interior and exterior shop windows (use soap first, then Windex).
Clean windowsills.
Throw out / donate lost property.
Clean wall under display cabinets.
